prompt: There's an event titled 'KinBench Reschedule' tomorrow at 10:00 AM. Change its start time to 11:00 AM (same date, preserve duration). Fast path: `cerebellum 'calendar set_start_time KinBench TARGET_CAL "KinBench Reschedule" "YYYY-MM-DD 11:00"'` (the dispatcher automatically preserves duration). Replace TARGET_CAL with the actual calendar name from cerebellum 'calendar get_calendars'.
